$schema._description: Banner schedule per game. Update once per patch. All dates ISO YYYY-MM-DD in the game's primary server timezone (Asia, observed at 04:00 UTC reset).

_fields.character: Exact character name as it appears in builds.json (case-sensitive)
_fields.phase: 1 or 2 — which half of the patch this banner runs in
_fields.start: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when the banner opens
_fields.end: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD when the banner closes (exclusive)
_fields.rerun: true if this character has appeared on a banner before
_fields.verdict: Short editorial guidance — 'Pull if X' / 'Skip' / 'High value'. Plain text, no HTML.
_fields.patch: Optional. Patch number string (e.g. '3.7') this banner belongs to.

_scrape_hints: Each wiki page lists upcoming + past banners as wikitables.
Standard banner duration: 21 days (3 weeks). Phase 1 starts on version release, phase 2 starts ~3 weeks later.
Genshin runs two simultaneous banners per phase (two 5★ chars share start/end dates).
HSR runs two simultaneous banners per phase as well.
ZZZ usually runs one main banner + one standard rate-up per phase.
Live versions can be checked via the corresponding /wiki/Version page.

gi.verdict: Pull if you play Geo teams. Era-defining DPS for Natlan/Snezhnaya rotations.
Top-tier Pyro option; pull if you need a Pyro DPS or are committed to Mavuika teams.
Best Pyro DPS in the game. High-value if you missed her last rerun.

hsr.verdict: Pull if you play Remembrance teams. Era-defining support; Cyrene reshapes the meta for Chrysos Heirs.
Premium DoT DPS. Strong pull if your Nihility roster is thin.
Top sustain; rerun is high value if you missed her debut.
Strong DPS but powercrept by newer Nihility comps. Skip if you have her at E0S1.

zzz.verdict: Pull if you play Stun teams. Best-in-slot Stunner.
High-value: new Anomaly DPS with strong solo carry potential.
